ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "vehicle_code" TEXT /* Unique code for internal reference */,
  "production_location" TEXT /* Location where the vehicle is produced */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the metrics belong to */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "cyl" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "disp" REAL /* Displacement (in cubic inches) */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "wt" REAL /* Weight (in 1000 lbs) */,
  "qsec" REAL /* Quarter mile time (in seconds) */,
  "am" INTEGER /* Transmission type (0 = automatic, 1 = manual) */,
  "gear" INTEGER /* Number of forward gears */,
  "carb" INTEGER /* Number of carburetors */,
  "acceleration_0_to_60" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the vehicle */,
  "braking_distance_60_to_0" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 mph */,
  "emissions" TEXT /* Emissions data (e.g., CO2, NOx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "gear_ratios" TEXT /* List of gear ratios for each transmission type */,
  "torque_converter" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the transmission has a torque converter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency for the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_configurations" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine configuration */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, V8) */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement (in cubic inches) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type used by the engine */,
  "engine_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the engine configuration */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "turbocharged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the engine is turbocharged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_configurations_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_transmissions" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission type */,
  "transmission_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the transmission configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_transmissions_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_transmissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_engines" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine configuration */,
  "engine_version" TEXT /* Version of the engine configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_engines_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_engines_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engine_configurations ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_versions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
